Dashboard Archive: 2026-04-02 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Today's data reveals an exceptional outlier in LINC, which ranks #1 with a dominant score of 95.2 and demonstrates extraordinary long-term momentum across all timeframes—particularly its 1,530% return over 10 years and 529% over 5 years, both far outpacing SPY by 1,308% and 461% respectively. LINC shows textbook momentum characteristics with all four moving average filters engaged (SMA 30/50/100/200), a clean momentum signal (0.34), confirmed volatility at 1.511x ratio, and consistent acceleration across ratio thresholds (passes 4 of 5), suggesting sustained secular strength rather than a short-term spike. In contrast, MPC ranks second but with notably weaker relative strength—its 10-year return of 540% lags LINC by nearly 3x, and its SPY outperformance (317% over 10 years) is less than one-quarter of LINC's advantage, indicating sector or cyclical rather than secular momentum. The correlation data shows LINC's highest alignment with materials (XLB at 0.364) and industrials (XLI at 0.318), suggesting its momentum is tied to broad economic/commodity cycle strength rather than isolated to a single
